codeReview.summary: The feature implementation correctly verified that the Batal button fix from prior commit (91f9551) was already in place across all 6 form pages. No new code changes were required as resetForm() and Batal button handlers were already implemented correctly. The worker correctly assessed that no modifications were needed and ran verification commands successfully.

issues.description: Handoff references commitId 'b85e701' which is actually the fix-kembali-button-all-forms fix, not a Batal-specific commit. However, since no new code changes were actually needed (the Batal fix was already applied in commit 91f9551), this is a documentation discrepancy rather than a functional issue. The source files correctly contain the Batal fix.

summary: Feature fix-batal-button-properly passes review. The worker correctly verified that the Batal button implementation (resetForm() + onCancel() calls) was already correctly in place from the prior fix-batal-button-all-forms feature. All 6 forms (COAFormPage, AspekKerjaFormPage, BlokFormPage, KasFormPage, BankFormPage, GudangFormPage) have proper resetForm() functions and Batal onClick handlers. Typecheck, lint, and build all passed. No new code changes were required. The handoff's commitId reference appears to point to the wrong commit (b85e701 instead of 91f9551), but this does not affect the actual implementation which is correct.
